# Chapter 3 — Clevis Setup Results

Smoke-test and example outputs from
[`code/chapter3_clevis_setup/`](../../code/chapter3_clevis_setup/).

## Included fixtures

| Path | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `examples/demo01_params.json` | Canonical demo parameter set (params only, no prebuilt meshes) |

## Generated by `build_and_label.py`

Run the CLI documented in the Chapter 3 code README. Default output root is
this folder. Example subfolders (`seed_*`, `demo01_smoke`, etc.) may appear after
local smoke runs.

Chapter 3 has no separate released dataset. Pools built from these generators
belong under `datasets/chapter4_clevis_pools/`.
